performer.vault_description: Manage your high-fidelity act reels, music, and professional assets.

booking.accept_agreement: I have reviewed the performance cues and confirm my technical team can execute them.

legal.safety_exit_summary: Performer retains 100% payout if exiting due to verified safety threats.
legal.asf_clause_description: Performer and Seeker represent and warrant that they are not members of or associated with Anti-Social Forces (Yakuza). Immediate contract termination applies for any breach.
legal.escrow_info: Funds are held in escrow and released 48h after the show.

home.hero_badge: THE GLOBAL STANDARD FOR DRAG EXCELLENCE
home.hero_description: Scale your empire across 18 international markets with the platform built for prestige. Manage bookings, assets, and media kits with a industry-disrupting 0.3% margin.
home.commission_desc: We only succeed when you do. Our 0.3% margin is the lowest in the entertainment industry, ensuring maximum revenue stays where it belongs: with the artists and venues.
home.profiles_desc: Cinematic media kits, technical riders, and verified credentials designed for the world's most prestigious stages.

search.title: Discover Talent
search.no_results: No performers found matching your criteria.

academy.hero_description: Stop guessing, start mastering. The definitive educational resources for the modern professional performer.
academy.no_modules: No modules found in this track.
academy.cert_description: This cryptographically signed document verifies that the performer meets the global professional standards of the DRAGDEM platform.
academy.curriculum_mastery: has successfully mastered the Institutional Pro curriculum, demonstrating advanced proficiency in global tax compliance, contractual safety, multi-currency logistics, and professional DEI standards.

InstitutionalPro.hero_description: Transitioning elite agencies and high-volume venues to the 0.3% digital standard. Eliminating administrative friction, securing labor dignity.
InstitutionalPro.infrastructure_fee_desc: Industry-disrupting transaction model designed for high-volume institutional contracts. Keep 99.7% of your budget for the art, not the platform.
InstitutionalPro.unified_billing_desc: Consolidate 100+ performer contracts into a single monthly statement. One payment, one invoice, zero overhead.
InstitutionalPro.labor_dignity_desc: Immediate social proof of safety and compliance. Every Pro-certified performer meets our rigorous LDI standards for professional security.
InstitutionalPro.audit_ready_desc: DRAGDEM automates the complex regulatory requirements of the global entertainment economy.
InstitutionalPro.paris_guso: Paris GUSO: Integrated social contribution filings.
InstitutionalPro.london_vat: London VAT: Professional invoicing for sole traders.
InstitutionalPro.cdmx_resico: CDMX RESICO: Automated SAT ISR/IVA withholding.
InstitutionalPro.rio_mei: Rio MEI: Integrated Pix & Lei Paulo Gustavo reporting.
InstitutionalPro.gold_seal_desc: Our seal is more than a badge. It's a commitment to professional excellence, safety protocols, and fair-pay standards verified by municipal partners.
InstitutionalPro.join_standard_desc: Apply for Institutional Pro access and schedule a walkthrough of the digital portal.

CDMX.title: Mexico City
CDMX.subtitle: Labor Dignity
CDMX.description: We safeguard your fiscal deductibility. Automation of RESICO (1.25%) and IVA (10.67%) withholdings and real-time CFDI 4.0 validation.
CDMX.resico_info: CDMX RESICO: Automation of 1.25% ISR and 10.67% IVA withholdings to ensure total deductibility.
CDMX.sat_sync_desc: Protection against SAT fines ($20k MXN+). Real-time validation of CFDI 4.0, zip codes, and tax regimes to guarantee 100% deductibility.
CDMX.corporate_desc: Formalizing the orange economy. We facilitate access to IMSS and professionalize fiscal identity to secure high-level corporate sponsorships.

Rio.title: Rio de Janeiro
Rio.subtitle: Carioca Performance
Rio.description: Pix and MEI automation. The professional standard for Pink Flamingo, Teatro Rival, and the entire Rio scene.
Rio.mei_info: Rio MEI: Automation of Pix and reporting for Lei Paulo Gustavo.
Rio.pix_desc: Instant settlement and NFS-e reconciliation. The standard for major stages like Pink Flamingo and Teatro Rival.
Rio.grants_desc: Institutional audit trail for grants and municipal funds. Legal security for producers and artists.

NYC.title: New York City
NYC.subtitle: NYC.PRO
NYC.description: Eliminate NYC FIFA exposure. Automated compliance with the Freelance Isn't Free Act, shielding venues from double-damages and civil penalties.
NYC.fifa_info: NYC FIFA: Automated $800+ written contracts and 30-day payment tracking for full legal compliance.
NYC.fifa_protection_desc: Automatic generation of mandatory written contracts for all $800+ bookings. Shielding venues from $25,000 civil penalties and double-damages litigation.
NYC.tax_automation_desc: Automated collection of W-9s and generation of 1099-NEC forms for hundreds of performers. Reduce your accountant's workload by 90%.
